zh.lifeSummary: 當Liutgard von Hohenberg於1075年出生時，她的父親Graf Bertold I "der ältere" von Hohenberg25歲，母親Luitgard von Baden6歲。她和Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於從1130年到1178年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Liutgard von Hohenberg于1075年出生时，她的父亲Graf Bertold I "der ältere" von Hohenberg25岁，母亲Luitgard von Baden6岁。她和Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于从1130年到1178年。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Liutgard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Liutgard von Hohenberg was born in 1075, her father, Graf Bertold I "der ältere" von Hohenberg, was 25 and her mother, Luitgard von Baden, was 6. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III. She died from 1130 to 1178.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Liutgard von Hohenberg est née en 1075, son père, Graf Bertold I "der ältere" von Hohenberg, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Luitgard von Baden, avait 6 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III. Elle est décédée du 1130 au 1178.

de.lifeSummary: Als Liutgard von Hohenberg 1075 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Bertold I "der ältere" von Hohenberg 25 und ihre Mutter Luitgard von Baden 6. Sie hatte mit Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb von 1130 bis 1178.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Liutgard von Hohenberg è nata il nel 1075, sua padre, Graf Bertold I "der ältere" von Hohenberg, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Luitgard von Baden, aveva 6 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III. Morì da 1130 a 1178.

ja.lifeSummary: Liutgard von Hohenbergが1075年に生まれた時，父Graf Bertold I "der ältere" von Hohenbergは25歳，母Luitgard von Badenは6歳であった。彼女はGottwald Count Of Henneberg IIIとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女はから1130年まで1178年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Liutgard von Hohenberg(이)가 1075년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Bertold I "der ältere" von Hohenberg(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Luitgard von Baden(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1130년 부터 1178년 까지 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Liutgard von Hohenberg nasceu em 1075, seu pai, Graf Bertold I "der ältere" von Hohenberg, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Luitgard von Baden, tinha 6 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III. Ela faleceu de 1130 a 1178.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Liutgard von Hohenberg родилась в 1075 г., её отцу по имени Graf Bertold I "der ältere" von Hohenberg было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Luitgard von Baden, 6. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III. Она умерла с 1130 по 1178.

sm.1130-1178: mai le 1130 e o'o I le 1178

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Liutgard von Hohenberg nació en 1075, su papá, Graf Bertold I "der ältere" von Hohenberg, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Luitgard von Baden, tenía 6 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III. Murió desde 1130 hasta 1178.
